_publications._publicationTitle: The draft genome of the Wisconsin Miniature SwineTM, a valuable biomedical research tool.

_contextSnippet: The FIS (F) of 170 individuals based on filtered GBS data was 0.38. At this level, it highlights a substantial deficit in heterozygosity, indicating moderate to high inbreeding within the population.
details: FIS of 0.38 indicates substantial deficit in heterozygosity and moderate to high inbreeding within the WMS TM population
